findings.evidence: `rg -n "def trans|theorem trans|Isotopic\.trans" TauCeti/Topology/Homotopy/Isotopy.lean` has no hits, while the roadmap says knot equivalence is the specialization of general `Isotopic` at `TauCetiRoadmap/GeometricTopology/README.md:488-489`.
findings.fix: Add a transitivity theorem for the level-preserving total-map definition, or keep this PR scoped to the data type and do not expose `Isotopic` as the shared equivalence relation yet.
findings.issue: `Isotopic` is the roadmap-level relation for knot equivalence, but its public API stops at `refl` and `symm`; there is no `Isotopy.trans`/`Isotopic.trans`, so downstream code cannot compose isotopies without unfolding and reproving the glued total-map embedding.

findings.evidence: This file has `instHomotopyLike` at lines 103-106 but no `Isotopy.apply_zero`/`apply_one`; `map_zero_left` is line 201 without `[simp]`. Mathlib marks the analogous `Homotopy.apply_zero/apply_one` and `HomotopyWith.apply_zero/apply_one` as `[simp]` in `Mathlib/Topology/Homotopy/Basic.lean:133,137,422,426`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` lemmas `Isotopy.apply_zero`/`Isotopy.apply_one` mirroring Mathlib's homotopy API, and tag `AmbientIsotopy.map_zero_left` as `[simp]`.
findings.issue: The new `FunLike` homotopy types do not provide simp endpoint lemmas for direct application syntax, and `AmbientIsotopy.map_zero_left` is not tagged `[simp]`; users writing `F (0,x)` or `Φ.toContinuousMap (0,y)` will not get the characteristic normal forms automatically.

summary: The new surface still does not expose `Isotopic` as the reusable relation the roadmap target needs. Endpoint normal forms also lack the expected simp API for direct use of the new bundled homotopies.
